metadata.name: ww-datagrid-ag
metadata.description: A highly customizable data grid/table component that supports features like sorting, filtering, pagination, row selection, and custom actions. It's designed to handle large datasets efficiently with various data types and styling options. It is based on the AG Grid framework.
features: Multiple data types (text, numbers, dates, booleans, images, action buttons, custom)
Customizable pagination with page size selector
Single and multiple row selection modes
Custom action buttons with styling options
Responsive design with customizable column widths (fixed or flex)
Comprehensive header and cell styling options
Custom display label formulas for cells
Localization support (en, fr, es, de, pt, custom)
Does not support row grouping or pivoting
Does not support server-side data loading

properties.name: rowData
properties.description: Data to display in the grid.

properties.name: idFormula
properties.description: Formula to generate unique IDs for each row. Always use 'context.mapping...'

properties.name: layout
properties.description: Layout mode for the grid. 'fixed' uses a fixed height, 'auto' adjusts height to content.

properties.name: height
properties.description: Height of the grid. Only used when layout is 'fixed'.

properties.name: textColor
properties.description: Color of all the text in the grid. Use more specific fields if needed (headerTextColor, cellColor, actionColor).

properties.name: borderColor
properties.description: Color of grid borders.

properties.name: wrapperBorderRadius
properties.description: Border radius of the grid wrapper.

properties.name: headerBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color of the header cells.

properties.name: headerTextColor
properties.description: Text color of the header cells.

properties.name: headerFontWeight
properties.description: Font weight of header text.

properties.name: headerFontSize
properties.description: Font size of header text.

properties.name: headerFontFamily
properties.description: Font family for header text.

properties.name: headerHeightMode
properties.description: Set to 'auto' to have auto height on the header, or null/'fixed' for a fixed height.

properties.name: headerHeight
properties.description: If headerHeightMode is not 'auto', the header height (defaults to the 48px of the template).

properties.name: useDynamicStyleHeader
properties.description: Enable dynamic style formulas for header. Then you can define one or several of the dynamic header properties.

properties.name: dynamicHeaderBackgroundColor
properties.description: Compute a dynamic background color using the column information. Column information will be provided through an object context.mapping?.['name' | 'id' | 'type' | 'dataType']. You can return a nullable value to fallback to the default style. useDynamicStyleHeader should be true to use this. Example: wwFormulas.if(context.mapping?.['name'] == 'Total', '#f1f5f9', null).

properties.name: dynamicHeaderTextColor
properties.description: Compute a dynamic text color using the column information. Column information will be provided through an object context.mapping?.['name' | 'id' | 'type' | 'dataType']. You can return a nullable value to fallback to the default style. useDynamicStyleHeader should be true to use this. Example: wwFormulas.if(context.mapping?.['id'] == 'status', '#1f2937', null)

properties.name: dynamicHeaderFontWeight
properties.description: Compute a dynamic font weight using the column information. Column information will be provided through an object context.mapping?.['name' | 'id' | 'type' | 'dataType']. You can return a nullable value to fallback to the default style. useDynamicStyleHeader should be true to use this. Possible values: 100, 200, 300, 400, 500, 600, 700, 800, 900. Example: wwFormulas.if(context.mapping?.['id'] == 'priority', 700, null)

properties.name: dynamicHeaderFontSize
properties.description: Compute a dynamic font size using the column information. Column information will be provided through an object context.mapping?.['name' | 'id' | 'type' | 'dataType']. You can return a nullable value to fallback to the default style. useDynamicStyleHeader should be true to use this. Example: wwFormulas.if(context.mapping?.['name'] == 'Total', '16px', null)

properties.name: dynamicHeaderFontFamily
properties.description: Compute a dynamic font family using the column information. Column information will be provided through an object context.mapping?.['name' | 'id' | 'type' | 'dataType']. You can return a nullable value to fallback to the default style. useDynamicStyleHeader should be true to use this. Example: wwFormulas.if(context.mapping?.['dataType'] == 'number', 'Inter', null)

properties.name: rowBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color for rows.

properties.name: rowAlternateColor
properties.description: Background color for alternate rows. Be sure it works well with cell default text color, as the color is common.

properties.name: rowHoverColor
properties.description: Background color when hovering over rows. Must be a semi transparent color, as it will be an overlay on top.

properties.name: rowVerticalPaddingScale
properties.description: A number for scaling the vertical padding of cells. Use 2 to multiply it by 2 or a number between 0 and 1 to make it smaller.

properties.name: columnHoverHighlight
properties.description: Enable column highlight on hover.

properties.name: columnHoverColor
properties.description: If active, column hover highlight color. Must be a semi transparent color, as it will be an overlay on top.

properties.name: cellColor
properties.description: Text color of grid cells.

properties.name: cellFontFamily
properties.description: Font family for cell text.

properties.name: cellFontSize
properties.description: Font size for cell text.

properties.name: cellSelectionBorderColor
properties.description: Override the theme border color for cell selection.

properties.name: cellAlignmentMode
properties.description: Whether to use inherited or custom cell alignment. Set to 'custom' to enable cellAlignment property.

properties.name: cellAlignment
properties.description: Global cell text alignment. Only used when cellAlignmentMode is 'custom'.

properties.name: menuTextColor
properties.description: Text color for the filter menu.

properties.name: menuBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color for the filter menu.

properties.name: selectedRowBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color for selected rows. Must be a semi transparent color, as it will be an overlay on top.

properties.name: selectionCheckboxColor
properties.description: Override the theme background color for selection checkboxes.

properties.name: checkboxUncheckedBorderColor
properties.description: Override the border color for unchecked selection checkboxes.

properties.name: focusShadow
properties.description: Box shadow for focused cells.

properties.name: actionColor
properties.description: Text color for action buttons.

properties.name: actionBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color for action buttons.

properties.name: actionPadding
properties.description: Padding for action buttons.

properties.name: actionBorder
properties.description: Border style for action buttons.

properties.name: actionBorderRadius
properties.description: Border radius for action buttons.

properties.name: actionFont
properties.description: Typography shorthand for action buttons. When set, overrides individual actionFontSize, actionFontFamily, actionFontWeight, actionFontStyle, and actionLineHeight properties.

properties.name: actionFontSize
properties.description: Font size of the button in action column. Only used when actionFont is not set.

properties.name: actionFontFamily
properties.description: Font family of the button in action column. Only used when actionFont is not set.

properties.name: actionFontWeight
properties.description: Font weight of the button in action column. Only used when actionFont is not set.

properties.name: actionFontStyle
properties.description: Font style of the button in action column. Only used when actionFont is not set.

properties.name: actionLineHeight
properties.description: Line height of the button in action column. Only used when actionFont is not set.

properties.name: rowSelection
properties.description: Type of row selection.

properties.name: enableClickSelection
properties.description: True to enable selection on row click. Only available when rowSelection is not 'none'.

properties.name: disableCheckboxes
properties.description: True to hide checkbox for selection. Only available when rowSelection is not 'none'.

properties.name: selectAll
properties.description: Behavior of select all button. Only available when rowSelection is 'multiple'.

properties.name: movableColumns
properties.description: Enable column drag and drop reordering.

properties.name: resizableColumns
properties.description: Enable column resizing by dragging column borders.

properties.name: rowReorder
properties.description: Enable row drag and drop reordering.

properties.name: pagination
properties.description: Enable/disable pagination.

properties.name: hasPaginationSelector
properties.description: Type of pagination page size selector. 'single' uses a fixed page size, 'multiple' shows a dropdown with page size options. Only available when pagination is enabled.

properties.name: paginationPageSize
properties.description: Number of rows per page. Only used when pagination is enabled and hasPaginationSelector is 'single'.

properties.name: paginationPageSizeSelector
properties.description: Array of page size options for the pagination dropdown. Only used when pagination is enabled and hasPaginationSelector is 'multiple'.

properties.name: initialFilters
properties.description: An AG Grid object describing the initial filtering. Example: { id1: { filterType: "number", type: "greaterThan", filter: 50 } }

properties.name: initialSort
properties.description: Description of the initial sort column. Example: [{ colId: "ID", sort: "asc" }]

properties.name: initialColumnsOrder
properties.description: List of the column order, if different from columns definition order.

properties.name: lang
properties.description: Locale used for the interface. If 'custom', the property localeText should be provided.

properties.name: localeText
properties.description: Only needed when lang is set to 'custom'. Must be an object provided to AG Grid for custom locale text.

properties.name: columns
properties.description: Column configurations. Each object describes a column of the grid. useCustomLabel defaults to false, if true, displayLabelFormula is used to format the label. widthAlgo defaults to 'fixed'. width is only used if widthAlgo is 'fixed' and must be a string in the shape of {value}px. flex is only used if widthAlgo is 'flex' and must be an integer.

cellDataType.description: The type of data that will be displayed in the column. Every type except 'action' is handled by the datagrid itself. If you see an existing cellDataType to 'custom', it's valid, but you will not be able to touch it. You don't support it for now.

useCustomLabel.availableCondition: cellDataType is not action, image, or custom

displayLabelFormula.availableCondition: useCustomLabel is true and cellDataType is not action, image, or custom

editable.availableCondition: cellDataType is not action, image, or custom

filter.availableCondition: cellDataType is not action or image

sortable.availableCondition: cellDataType is not action or image

events.name: action
events.description: Triggered when clicking on an action cell.

events.name: cellValueChanged
events.description: Triggered after a cell edition so that you can update the data source.

events.name: rowSelected
events.description: Triggered when a row is selected.

events.name: rowDeselected
events.description: Triggered when a row is deselected.

events.name: rowClicked
events.description: Triggered when clicking on a row.

events.name: rowDragStart
events.description: Triggered when row drag is initiated.

events.name: rowDragged
events.description: Triggered when row drag is ended.

events.name: columnMoved
events.description: Triggered when a column has been moved.

events.name: filterChanged
events.description: Triggered when filters are applied or changed.

events.name: sortChanged
events.description: Triggered when sorting is applied or changed.

actions.label: Reset filters
actions.description: Reset the filters of the grid.

actions.label: Reset sort
actions.description: Reset the sort of the grid.

actions.label: Select all
actions.description: Select all rows of the grid.

actions.label: Deselect all
actions.description: Deselect all rows of the grid.

actions.label: Select row
actions.description: Select a specific row of the grid.

actions.label: Deselect row
actions.description: Deselect a specific row of the grid.

variables.name: filters
variables.description: Current filter state as an object containing active filters.

variables.name: sort
variables.description: Current sort state as an object containing sort configurations.

variables.name: columnOrder
variables.description: Current columns order state as an array of column ids.

variables.name: data
variables.description: Object containing computed data states of the grid including allData, total, sortedFilteredData, totalSortedFilteredData, perPageTotal, totalPages, displayedData, and totalDisplayedRecords.

specifications: idFormula always uses javascript with context.mapping value 'context.mapping...'
CRITICAL: You have to perfectly style this datagrid according to the page.
Default theme is usually great, use other colors only if you need to be on brand.
Row reorder does not work well with pagination enabled at the same time.

The datagrid handles pagination entirely on the frontend. When binding a table view to the datagrid, that table view must NOT have a backend limit set — the datagrid needs all rows available. Never add a ww-paginator alongside a datagrid. Use the datagrid's built-in `pagination` and `paginationPageSize` properties instead.
The weweb datagrid does not support custom content in columns. If you see an existing cellDataType to 'custom', it's valid, but you will not be able to touch it. You don't support it for now.

examples.description: A user management table with avatar, text fields, a date column with custom formatting, and an edit action button
A simple paginated product table with sorting and filtering
examples.example: Set rowData to bind to your products array. Set idFormula to context.mapping?.['id']. Add columns for name (text, flex), price (number, fixed 100px), category (text, flex), and inStock (boolean, fixed 80px). Enable pagination with paginationPageSize 20. Set sortable and filter true on all columns. Use default styling.

examples.description: A grid with multiple action buttons using the action event
examples.example: Add two action-type columns: one with actionName 'view' and actionLabel 'View', another with actionName 'delete' and actionLabel 'Delete'. In the workflow triggered by the 'action' event, use a conditional branch checking event.actionName to handle each action differently.
